content:
**Mox** is a two‑engineer SaaS platform for managing vehicle‑sharing (or similar) operations.  
The project is organized around a set of functional modules that will be built over six two‑week sprints:

| Sprint | Focus |
|--------|-------|
| **0** | Requirements, overall architecture, DB schema, core adapters (payment, IoT, notifications) |
| **1** | Auth & RBAC (OTP login/registration, role‑based access, basic member profile) |
| **2** | Order Management System (OMS) – reservation flow, inventory‑collision prevention, rule engine |
| **3** | Contracts & Payments – digital contract preview & e‑signature, payment gateway integration, invoice generation |
| **4** | KYC & Billing – document upload, verification workflow, billing & settlement |
| **5** | IoT & Operations – vehicle pick‑up/return, notifications, final launch tasks |

### Core Modules
| Module | Main Capabilities |
|--------|-------------------|
| **Platform** | Project scaffolding, DB design, payment & IoT adapters, notification handler |
| **Auth** | OTP‑based registration & login, RBAC (admin, manager, user roles) |
| **OMS** | C‑side reservation UI, B‑side manual order creation, inventory‑collision avoidance, rule engine (personal‑mode, self‑service, visitor booking) |
| **Contract** | Contract preview, canvas e‑signature, PDF generation, contract storage & retrieval |
| **Payment** | Countdown UI, auto‑cancel on timeout, online payment integration (BluePay‑style), 3‑DS, pre‑auth for deposits, cash/transfer handling, electronic invoicing |
| **KYC** | Document upload, verification workflow, audit logs |
| **IoT** | Adapter for vehicle lock/unlock, status notifications, real‑time alerts |

### Team Roles
- **Engineer A** – Backend / Architecture / Core business logic, adapters, APIs.  
- **Engineer B** – Front‑end / Admin UI / C‑side flows, UX.

### Deliverables
- A full‑stack web app (React front‑end, Node/TS back‑end) with admin dashboard.  
- Integration points for payment providers, IoT hardware, and KYC document storage.  
- Automated contract generation and e‑signature handling.  
- Robust inventory management to prevent double‑booking.

In short, **Mox** is a compact, sprint‑driven project that builds a complete vehicle‑sharing management system—from user authentication and KYC to order processing, contract signing, payment handling, and IoT‑driven vehicle control.
Glad you’re interested! If you’d like to dive into any specific module, see the roadmap, or view the live demo, just let me know. 🚀
